cases.description: Governance policy copy should map to operational clarity and bounded density.

input.content:
# Runtime Policy Governance

## Required Controls
- All rollout changes must pass validator gate checks.
- Deployment approval is mandatory before release.
- Compliance evidence must be attached to every change.

## Enforcement
Teams shall preserve canonical contracts and must not bypass authority boundaries.

cases.description: Trust-oriented structured guidance can allow macro golden-ratio posture.

input.content:
# Reliability Brief

## Stable Structure
- Trusted evidence keeps decisions transparent and clear.
- Verified safety checks preserve reliable operations.
- Stable communication reduces uncertainty.

## Reading Path
1. Start with the verified facts.
2. Keep summary, detail, and follow-up clearly separated.
3. Preserve heading contrast for mobile readability.

cases.description: Urgent campaign copy can be expressive but must keep bounded proportion rule.

input.content:
# Launch Now

Our campaign must move immediately. This urgent launch is critical for customer engagement now!

## Why This Matters
- Brand momentum depends on immediate action.
- The CTA must be clear now.
- Teams should escalate blockers immediately.

cases.description: Technical spec text should avoid false-positive over-stylization.

input.content:
# API Contract

## Schema
- JSON schema defines request and response fields.
- Validator checks ensure deterministic fixture output.
- Script execution is tested through eval gates.

## Notes
Use interface and type consistency before rollout.
